birthday_message:
My Dearest ,

Happy Birthday!

I started writing you a simple "Happy Birthday" message, but then I realized that our friendship deserves more than just a few lines. It deserves a letter.

Thank you for being my home away from home. You are the person I can call at 3 a.m. when my brain won't shut off, and the first person I want to celebrate with when something good happens. You've seen me at my absolute worst—grumpy, messy, and broken—and you never ran away. Instead, you stayed, you listened, and you helped me put the pieces back together.

Having you in my life has made me a better person. You teach me patience, you make me laugh until my stomach hurts, and you love me even when I'm unlovable.

I hope this next year brings you everything you've been dreaming of. You deserve all the happiness, success, and peace in the world.

Thank you for being you.
